parameterization: nonnegative pressure-band scaling of reduced shortwave absorption and dynamic H2O coefficient tables

scan.method: single pressure-band nonnegative shortwave coefficient-table scale scan

gpoint_scan.method: per-g-point pressure-band nonnegative shortwave coefficient-table scale scan

iterative_component_gpoint_scan.method: iterative component-separated per-g-point pressure-band table scaling

active_table_entry_scan.method: active coefficient-table entry scaling inside best component pressure band

pairwise_gpoint_scan.method: pairwise per-g-point pressure-band table scaling over best single-move candidates

iterative_gpoint_scan.method: iterative per-g-point pressure-band nonnegative table scaling

next_required_work: The accepted iterative component pressure-band moves are already promoted into the main reduced optimizer and reduced-accuracy artifact; move beyond bounded pressure-band table scales to a constrained multi-parameter coefficient-table or quadrature-bin optimizer against flux and heating residuals.
